strategic pivot.

environments. Proven track record in orchestrating multi-region Kubernetes
clusters, optimizing microservices architecture, and leading cross-functional
engineering teams to deliver robust data infrastructure. Focused on measurable
performance gains and systemic resilience.

children.name: Heading 5 → Senior Technical Lead | Nexus Core Technologies
children.characters: Senior Technical Lead | Nexus Core Technologies

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Spearheaded the migration of legacy monolithic architecture to a decoupled
microservices framework, resulting in a 40% reduction in deployment latency and a
99.99% uptime SLA adherence.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Engineered a scalable data pipeline utilizing Apache Kafka and Flink, processing over 5TB
of telemetry data daily with sub-second real-time analytics delivery.

children.name: Text
children.characters:
Mentored a team of 12 mid-to-senior level engineers, establishing rigorous code review
protocols and automated CI/CD pipelines that reduced bug regression by 25%.
